node.html: A comprehensive object-oriented CRUD model for a linked list data structure with proper hierarchy into groups/subgroups and searchable properties, as well as an additional option to communicate through a socket tunnel.

Time dependent evaluation of probability density of a quantum system with Wigner Monte Carlo method based on the signed particle formulation of quantum mechanics. Translated from (C++) and modified on Prof. Dr. Jean Michel Sellier's implementation of (ballistic) single-body Wigner Monte Carlo.
Simulation of classical three-dimensional Ising model using Metropolis algorithm to study magnetic phase transitions.
Simulation of electromagnetic two body problem with Lienard-Wiechert relativistic potentials.
Numerical solver for general Sturm Liouville type equations that caters to both initial value and boundary value problems equipped with integrated support for Legendre and Bessel equations.
A LaTeX template designed for the students of the Department of Physics at Shahjalal University of Science and Technology, Bangladesh.

An advanced scientific calculator, especially made for complex analysis which also includes unit conversion and date calculation features. This project was submitted to Pran Frooto Viqarunnisa Noon 16th Science Festival-2012.
A calculator capable of computing the divergence of both finite and infinite sequences.
Basic email management application with inbox view.
A simple photo viewer applicaction, born out of sheer boredom with the Windows Photo Viewer in Windows 7, and heavily influenced by the awesomeness of Picasa.
A personalized web browser designed for the purpose of software development practices.
Bespoke screen capture application with basic features built for software development practices.
